<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is an Electron desktop application project. The main process runs in `main.js` and the renderer process in `renderer.js`. The app uses `contextIsolation` and a `preload.js` script for secure IPC between processes.
